title: Bulbocastanum ferulaceum
taxonomy: Bulbocastanum ferulaceum is a plant that falls under the category of flowering plants. More specifically, it is classified as a perennial plant within the family Colchicaceae. This family is a part of the order Liliales and the class Liliopsida. The order Liliales is also known as the lily order, and the class Liliopsida is a group of monocotyledonous plants. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics, such as its underground storage organs and its flowering habit.
uses: Bulbocastanum ferulaceum, also known as the autumn gentian, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
